ann-morrison-park.note: Large lots at the Americana Blvd and Royal Blvd entrances

baggley-park.note: Small lot by the tennis courts

barber-observation-point.note: Parking lot on site (per the city)

bernardine-quinn-riverside-park.note: Quinn’s Pond lot off Whitewater Park Blvd

borah-park.note: Lot near the pool off Aurora Dr

bowler-park.note: Pull-in parking along the park’s internal loop road

camels-back-park.note: Small lot off 13th St fills fast on weekends — overflow is neighborhood street parking

camels-back-reserve.note: Use the Camel’s Back Park lot or Heron St trailhead

catalpa-park.note: Small lot on the south edge of the park

cottonwood-park.note: Small lot on the west side

eagle-rock-park.note: Lot on the south side of the park

esther-simplot-park.note: Lots along Whitewater Park Blvd, shared with Quinn’s Pond — arrive early on hot weekends

fort-boise-park.note: Multiple lots off Fort St and Reserve St

hillside-park.note: Lot shared with Hillside Junior High next door

hillside-to-hollow-reserve.note: Small trailhead lots — fill early on weekends

hobble-creek-park.note: Lot shared with the West YMCA side

hyatt-hidden-lakes-reserve.note: Trailhead lot off Maple Grove Rd

idaho-anne-frank-human-rights-memorial.note: Library and Cabin lots nearby are often full — expect paid parking

ivywild-park.note: Lots near the pool; busiest during swim season

ja-kaff-boise-whitewater-park.note: Use the Esther Simplot / Quinn’s Pond lots off Whitewater Park Blvd

julia-davis-park.note: Several lots along Julia Davis Drive inside the park; fills during zoo hours and events

kathryn-albertson-park.note: Lot at the Americana Blvd entrance

magnolia-park.note: Parking lot on site (per the city)

marianne-williams-park.note: Lot off E Barber Valley Dr

mariposa-park.note: Small lot at the northeast corner

molenaar-park.note: Lot off S Maple Grove Rd

morris-hill-park.note: Pull-in parking bays along the park edge

oregon-trail-reserve.note: Trailhead lot off Lake Forest Dr

polecat-gulch-reserve.note: Trailhead lot off Cartwright Rd (per the city)

primrose-park.note: Small lot with ADA van-accessible parking (per the city)

sunset-park.note: Lot on the south side of the park

sycamore-park.note: Lot on the school side of the park

willow-lane-athletic-complex.note: Large complex lot off Willow Ln

willow-lane-park.note: Shares the Willow Lane Athletic Complex lot next door

winstead-park.note: Lot on the south side off Northview St
